task_completion.description: The agent opens the email client and accesses the 'Network Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email client application is open, and 'Network Support' is selected in the folder/account navigation pane or visible in the header.

task_completion.description: The agent stars the 'Core Switch Failure - Building A' conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email list, the conversation with the subject 'Core Switch Failure - Building A' has a filled, highlighted, or active star icon next to it.

task_completion.description: The agent stars the 'VPN Gateway Timeout Errors' conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email list, the conversation with the subject 'VPN Gateway Timeout Errors' has a filled, highlighted, or active star icon next to it.

task_completion.description: The agent stars the 'DNS Resolution Failures Across Campus' conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email list, the conversation with the subject 'DNS Resolution Failures Across Campus' has a filled, highlighted, or active star icon next to it.

task_completion.description: The agent ensures only the three target conversations are starred, typically by checking the 'Starred' view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Starred' folder or filter is active in the email client, and exactly three emails are listed matching the target subjects. Distractor emails (e.g., printer connectivity, WiFi performance) must NOT be starred.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical email client to star the messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on star icons within a GUI email application, rather than using a terminal to run scripts or modify mailbox files directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the task completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is a genuine email client (like Thunderbird, Evolution, or a webmail interface), not a text editor or word processor with typed out subjects.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete distractor emails to achieve the 'only three' requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Distractor emails (e.g., workstation setup, VoIP password reset) are still visible in the main inbox/mailbox view, just without stars.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires starring exactly 3 specific emails in the 'Network Support' mailbox: 'Core Switch Failure - Building A', 'VPN Gateway Timeout Errors', and 'DNS Resolution Failures Across Campus'. The expected starred count is exactly 3. Distractor emails must remain unstarred.
